sys_script_include.description: 2.8.3HF | 2023-09-18 | raj | DFCT0012145 - Drag-and-Drop Template Tasks trigger if "Duration Warning: Subtask Duration Exceeds Parent Duration" but does not trigger removing the warning if it's resolved 2.8.3HF | 2023-09-15 | STRY0143857 - Add "Clone" to the Template Tree Widget as a Primary Action 2.8.3 (Template Updates Addon) STRY0142161 - Feature allowing for Templates to be copied/cloned New script created to handle template copy, move and clone Methods to suppprt Template Copy capabilities
sys_script_include.name: template_Copy_Move_Methods
